metadata.title: Italy Contractor Management Services | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Italy contractor management and compliant contractor onboarding. Engage freelancers in Italy without entity. Italian contractor classification, INPS, contracts. Fast onboarding.

faqs.title: Italy Contractor FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about contractor management in Italy.

items.question: What is the risk of misclassifying contractors in Italy?
items.answer: Italian authorities can reclassify contractors as employees, leading to back INPS contributions, taxes, penalties, and compliance issues. Using compliant contracts and proper classification assessment reduces this risk.

items.question: How fast can I onboard a contractor in Italy?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank, contractor onboarding typically takes 2–5 business days once you provide engagement details. We handle contracts, Codice Fiscale verification, tax forms, and compliance checks for Italy.

items.question: Can I convert a contractor to an employee later?
items.answer: Yes. If a contractor role becomes permanent, we can convert them to a full employee via our Italy EOR service, with compliant Italian employment contracts and benefits (INPS, INAIL, TFR, leave).

items.question: Do you handle contractor payments and invoicing in Italy?
items.answer: Yes. Our platform supports contractor invoicing and payments in EUR, with proper tax documentation, VAT (IVA) compliance, and tax filings for Italian contractors.

items.question: What are the INPS and tax requirements for contractors in Italy?
items.answer: Contractors may need to register with INPS if they meet certain criteria. VAT (IVA) registration is required if annual turnover exceeds €65,000. We help ensure all INPS, VAT, and tax obligations are met for compliant contractor engagements.
